DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted. Cross-defendant CNET Networks, Inc.'s demurrer to First Amended CRoss-Complaint:
As to cause of action number One for Breach of Contract - OVERRULED with 10 days to answer;
As to cause of action number Two for Fraud - OVERRULED with 10 days to answer;
As to cause of action number Three for Negligent Misrepresentation - OVERRULED with 10 days to answer;
As to cause of action number Four re Business and Professions Code 17200 - OVERRULED with 10 days to answer;
And as to cause of action number Five RICO - OVERRULED with 10 days to answer. (JJM/CL)LEE BATARA, CSR 3759
